user.title: Add a monitored device
user.description: Give this a name and pick what it is. A WireGuard interface isn't monitored itself, but can then be selected as the "interface" for a ping device.

data.interface: Network interface (pick a configured WireGuard tunnel, or type your own)

wireguard.title: WireGuard interface
wireguard.description: Either point at an existing wg-quick config file, or fill in the keys/peer below to build one. Requires wireguard-tools and NET_ADMIN on the Home Assistant host.

data.interface: Interface name (derived from the config file name if left blank)

notify.title: Notifications & schedule
notify.description: Choose which notify services (e.g. your phone's companion app) should be alerted, and how often this device is checked.

data.notify_offline: Notify when this device goes offline
data.notify_online: Also notify when it comes back online

error.invalid_cron: That's not a valid cron expression.
error.wireguard_needs_interface_or_config_path: Set an interface name, or a config file path to derive it from.
error.wireguard_bad_config_path: Couldn't derive an interface name from that config file path.
error.wireguard_needs_inline_fields: Fill in a config file path, or private key + address + peer public key + peer allowed IPs.

abort.already_configured: A device with this name is already configured.

init.title: Notifications & schedule
init.description: Change which notify services are used and how often this device is checked.

data.notify_offline: Notify when this device goes offline
data.notify_online: Also notify when it comes back online

wireguard.title: WireGuard interface
wireguard.description: Editing this reconnects the tunnel with the new details.

data.interface: Interface name (derived from the config file name if left blank)

error.invalid_cron: That's not a valid cron expression.
error.wireguard_needs_interface_or_config_path: Set an interface name, or a config file path to derive it from.
error.wireguard_bad_config_path: Couldn't derive an interface name from that config file path.
error.wireguard_needs_inline_fields: Fill in a config file path, or private key + address + peer public key + peer allowed IPs.
